# SocialMate

> Free social media scheduling platform with AI content tools, analytics, team collaboration, and a built-in charity initiative.

SocialMate is a web-based social media management tool built for creators, small businesses, and agencies. It is free to start with no credit card required and no per-channel fees.

## What SocialMate does

- Schedule and publish posts to Bluesky, Discord, Telegram, and Mastodon (Instagram, TikTok, Reddit, Facebook, and Threads in review)
- 12 AI-powered tools: caption generation, hashtag research, competitor tracking, content gap analysis, best-time suggestions, trend scanning, evergreen recycling, and more
- Bulk scheduler — upload and schedule many posts at once
- Link-in-bio page builder
- Analytics dashboard with per-platform engagement tracking
- Team collaboration and multi-client workspaces (agency tier)
- RSS import for automated content sharing

## Pricing

- Free: unlimited posts, 2 team seats, 75 AI credits/month, all core features
- Pro: $5/month — more accounts, 500 AI credits/month, client workspaces
- Agency: $20/month — unlimited workspaces, 2000 AI credits/month, white-label options

## Studio Stax

A curated directory of social media tools and services. Founding listings at $100/year (first 100 spots), standard at $150/year. Listings rank by SM-Give charitable donations — the more a studio gives, the higher it appears.

## SM-Give

A built-in charity initiative. Studios listed in Studio Stax can donate through the platform to climb the directory rankings. Giving more = higher visibility.

## Company

- Built by: Gilgamesh Enterprise LLC (Wyoming LLC)

SocialMate publishes guides, tips, and updates at https://socialmate.studio/blog (41 posts as of April 2026). Comparison hub covers 18 tools.
